name: heyclaude
title: HeyClaude
description: Search and copy Claude agents, MCP servers, skills, hooks, rules, commands, guides, and statuslines from HeyClaude.
author: jsonbored

commands.name: search
commands.title: Search HeyClaude
commands.description: Browse HeyClaude entries and copy install commands, configs, or full usable assets.

commands.name: search-agents
commands.title: Search Agents
commands.description: Browse HeyClaude Claude agents and copy reusable agent assets.

commands.name: search-mcp
commands.title: Search MCP Servers
commands.description: Browse HeyClaude MCP servers and copy install or config details.

commands.name: search-tools
commands.title: Search Tools
commands.description: Browse HeyClaude AI tools and open source or documentation links.

commands.name: search-skills
commands.title: Search Skills
commands.description: Browse HeyClaude agent skills and copy package guidance.

commands.name: search-rules
commands.title: Search Rules
commands.description: Browse HeyClaude AI coding rules and copy rule content.

commands.name: search-commands
commands.title: Search Commands
commands.description: Browse HeyClaude slash commands and copy command assets.

commands.name: search-hooks
commands.title: Search Hooks
commands.description: Browse HeyClaude Claude Code hooks and copy hook assets.

commands.name: search-guides
commands.title: Search Guides
commands.description: Browse HeyClaude guides and open reference pages.

commands.name: search-statuslines
commands.title: Search Statuslines
commands.description: Browse HeyClaude Claude Code statusline configurations.

commands.name: jobs
commands.title: Browse HeyClaude Jobs
commands.description: Browse active HeyClaude jobs, review role details, and open external apply links.

commands.name: submit-content
commands.title: Submit New Content
commands.description: Create a reviewed HeyClaude content submission with fields that map to the website and GitHub issue forms.

commands.name: get-involved
commands.title: Get Involved with HeyClaude
commands.description: Open HeyClaude contribution, newsletter, GitHub, jobs, API, and community links.
